model.ecommerce_dw.stg_orders.name: stg_orders
model.ecommerce_dw.stg_orders.description: Staged orders from the ecommerce operational database. Cleans and standardizes raw order data.

model.ecommerce_dw.stg_customers.name: stg_customers
model.ecommerce_dw.stg_customers.description: Staged customer data cleaned and deduplicated from the CRM source system.

model.ecommerce_dw.stg_products.name: stg_products
model.ecommerce_dw.stg_products.description: Staged product catalog data from the PIM system.

model.ecommerce_dw.stg_order_items.name: stg_order_items
model.ecommerce_dw.stg_order_items.description: Individual line items within each order.

unit_price.name: unit_price
unit_price.description: Price per unit at time of order

line_total.name: line_total
line_total.description: Total line item value after discount

model.ecommerce_dw.stg_payments.name: stg_payments
model.ecommerce_dw.stg_payments.description: Staged payment transactions from the payment gateway.

model.ecommerce_dw.stg_sessions.name: stg_sessions
model.ecommerce_dw.stg_sessions.description: Web and mobile session data from the event tracking platform.

page_views.name: page_views
page_views.description: Number of page views in session

model.ecommerce_dw.stg_inventory.name: stg_inventory
model.ecommerce_dw.stg_inventory.description: Staged inventory snapshots from the warehouse management system.

model.ecommerce_dw.int_orders_enriched.name: int_orders_enriched
model.ecommerce_dw.int_orders_enriched.description: Orders joined with customer and payment data. Calculates order-level metrics and flags.

is_first_order.name: is_first_order
is_first_order.description: Whether this is customers first order

model.ecommerce_dw.int_order_items_enric.name: int_order_items_enriched
model.ecommerce_dw.int_order_items_enric.description: Order items joined with product data, calculates margin and contribution metrics.

product_name.name: product_name
product_name.description: Product name at time of order

model.ecommerce_dw.int_customer_orders.name: int_customer_orders
model.ecommerce_dw.int_customer_orders.description: Customer-level order aggregations used to compute lifetime value and purchase frequency.

model.ecommerce_dw.int_product_inventory.name: int_product_inventory
model.ecommerce_dw.int_product_inventory.description: Products joined with latest inventory snapshots across all warehouses.

model.ecommerce_dw.dim_customers.name: dim_customers
model.ecommerce_dw.dim_customers.description: Customer dimension table with lifetime value metrics, RFM scores and segmentation. SCD Type 2.

model.ecommerce_dw.dim_products.name: dim_products
model.ecommerce_dw.dim_products.description: Product dimension with inventory status and profitability metrics.

model.ecommerce_dw.dim_date.name: dim_date
model.ecommerce_dw.dim_date.description: Date dimension spanning 2020-2030 with fiscal calendar, week numbers and holiday flags.

model.ecommerce_dw.fct_orders.name: fct_orders
model.ecommerce_dw.fct_orders.description: Core orders fact table. One row per order. Primary fact table for revenue reporting.

model.ecommerce_dw.fct_order_items.name: fct_order_items
model.ecommerce_dw.fct_order_items.description: Order items fact table at line item grain. Used for product performance and margin analysis.

model.ecommerce_dw.fct_sessions.name: fct_sessions
model.ecommerce_dw.fct_sessions.description: Web and mobile sessions fact table. Used for funnel analysis and conversion reporting.

model.ecommerce_dw.mart_customer_360.name: mart_customer_360
model.ecommerce_dw.mart_customer_360.description: Customer 360 reporting mart. Combines orders, sessions and inventory into a single customer view for CRM and BI tools.

model.ecommerce_dw.mart_product_performa.name: mart_product_performance
model.ecommerce_dw.mart_product_performa.description: Product performance reporting mart. Revenue, margin, inventory and velocity metrics per product for BI dashboards.

source.ecommerce_dw.ecommerce_db.raw_ord.name: raw_orders
source.ecommerce_dw.ecommerce_db.raw_ord.description: Raw orders table from the ecommerce transactional database (Postgres replica)

source.ecommerce_dw.ecommerce_db.raw_cus.name: raw_customers
source.ecommerce_dw.ecommerce_db.raw_cus.description: Raw customers from CRM system loaded via Fivetran

source.ecommerce_dw.ecommerce_db.raw_pro.name: raw_products
source.ecommerce_dw.ecommerce_db.raw_pro.description: Raw product catalog from PIM system

source.ecommerce_dw.payments_db.raw_paym.name: raw_payments
source.ecommerce_dw.payments_db.raw_paym.description: Raw payment transactions from Stripe via Fivetran

source.ecommerce_dw.event_db.raw_session.name: raw_sessions
source.ecommerce_dw.event_db.raw_session.description: Raw session events from Segment CDP

source.ecommerce_dw.warehouse_db.raw_inv.name: raw_inventory
source.ecommerce_dw.warehouse_db.raw_inv.description: Raw daily inventory snapshots from the WMS system
